description_text: About this item 【Good Quality】: Made of high-quality ABS material, it is durable, waterproof, not easy to deform, there are four colors for you to choose. It is lightweight, scratch-resistant, not easy to rust, and has a long service life. Shark fin style brings a stylish look to your car. It is a product that is both practical and aesthetically pleasing. 【Shark Fin Spoilers】: The shark fin design uses aerodynamic principles to reduce wind effect and protect your car's rear bumper from scratches or minor wear and damage. This unique design makes your car look more aesthetically pleasing, more racing-like and stand out from other vehicles. 【Universal Fit】: The package contains 4 rear diffuser spoilers and is universally suitable for most vehicles. The product size is 4.9x2.6 inches, please confirm the size before purchasing to make sure it is more suitable for your vehicle. If you have any questions about our products, please contact us directly! We will help you solve the problem and will always do our best to meet your needs. 【Easy to Install】: The diffuser is very simple to install, fix the diverter to the rear bumper with double-sided tape, and then install screws to make it more stable. In that way no matter how fast you drive or how bad the road condition is, it won't fall off easily. The installation process won't take you much time. You can do it independently. 【Elegant Surface】: There are four colors for you to choose, black, red edge black cover, red cover, carbon fiber. Elegant surface and exquisite workmanship make your vehicle look beautiful and stylish. There are four splitters, matching screws and strong double-sided tape in the package. If you want your car to have a sporty style, you can try this product. Product Description Specification: Material: ABS Item Weight: 5.3 ounces Package Dimensions: 6.7 x 5.1 x 1.97 inches Color: Black, red edge with black cover, red cover, carbon fiber style Features: -High-quality ABS material, durable, waterproof, not easy to deform. -Shark fin design, reduce wind effect and protect your car's rear bumper from scratches. -4 rear diffuser spoilers in the package, universally suitable for most vehicles. -Very simple to install, it won't fall off with double-sided tape and screws. -Elegant surface and exquisite workmanship make your vehicle look sporty and stylish.
